summary: To break stagnation and address the persistent mismatches for the don't-care input combinations (3, 8, 11, 12), this patch eliminates the case statement and instead implements out_sop in minimum sum-of-products (SOP) form and out_pos in minimum product-of-sums (POS) form, as required by the prompt. This ensures that the outputs are always assigned deterministically for all input combinations, and matches the reference model's expected logic-0 for all unspecified cases. This approach avoids any risk of uninitialized or X outputs and directly encodes the minimal logic expressions for the required outputs.
risks: If the reference model expects a different minimal form or a different assignment for don't-care cases, mismatches may persist.
If the testbench or reference model expects outputs to be assigned differently for the don't-care cases, further adjustment may be needed.
next_steps: Run simulation to confirm that the outputs match the reference model for all input combinations.
If mismatches persist, probe the outputs for the don't-care input combinations (3, 8, 11, 12) to verify deterministic logic-0 assignment.
If needed, further adjust the logic expressions to match the reference model's behavior.
